A

add(Complex) - Method in record class com.mycompany.model.Complex
Add another complex number to this one.
addChild(CircuitElement) - Method in class com.mycompany.model.ConnectionNode
Add a child element to this connection.

C

Capacitor - Class in com.mycompany.model
Capacitor primitive component.
Capacitor(double) - Constructor for class com.mycompany.model.Capacitor
Create a capacitor with the given capacitance.
CircuitController - Class in com.mycompany.controller
Controller class: handles input parsing, invokes model calculations, and uses the view to display results.
CircuitController(ConsoleView) - Constructor for class com.mycompany.controller.CircuitController
Create a controller using the provided view for input/output.
CircuitController.ParseResult - Record Class in com.mycompany.controller
Data holder for parsed parameters.
CircuitElement - Class in com.mycompany.model
Base abstraction for elements that can provide impedance and a short description.
CircuitElement() - Constructor for class com.mycompany.model.CircuitElement
Protected no-arg constructor.
com.mycompany.app - package com.mycompany.app
Application entrypoint package.
com.mycompany.controller - package com.mycompany.controller
Controller package.
com.mycompany.model - package com.mycompany.model
Model package.
com.mycompany.view - package com.mycompany.view
View package.
Complex - Record Class in com.mycompany.model
Simple immutable complex number implementation used for impedance arithmetic.
Complex(double, double) - Constructor for record class com.mycompany.model.Complex
Creates an instance of a Complex record class.
Component - Class in com.mycompany.model
Abstract base class for primitive components (Resistor, Capacitor, Inductor).
Component(double) - Constructor for class com.mycompany.model.Component
Create a primitive component with the given value.
ComponentSpec - Record Class in com.mycompany.model
Specification DTO for a single component parsed from user input.
ComponentSpec(String, double) - Constructor for record class com.mycompany.model.ComponentSpec
Creates an instance of a ComponentSpec record class.
CompositeCircuit - Class in com.mycompany.model
Wrapper that represents a top-level circuit (for display and API).
CompositeCircuit(ConnectionNode) - Constructor for class com.mycompany.model.CompositeCircuit
Construct a CompositeCircuit from a ConnectionNode.
computeEquivalent(CircuitController.ParseResult) - Method in class com.mycompany.controller.CircuitController
Public API used by GUI: compute equivalent impedance for already-parsed parameters.
computeEquivalent(ConnectionNode, double) - Method in class com.mycompany.controller.CircuitController
Public helper to compute impedance from an existing ConnectionNode.
ConnectionNode - Class in com.mycompany.model
Composite connection node representing either a series or parallel grouping of CircuitElement children.
ConnectionNode(boolean) - Constructor for class com.mycompany.model.ConnectionNode
Create a connection node.
ConsoleView - Class in com.mycompany.view
Console-based view: prompts user for circuit parameters and prints results to standard output.
ConsoleView() - Constructor for class com.mycompany.view.ConsoleView
Construct a ConsoleView instance.

D

description() - Method in class com.mycompany.model.Capacitor
 
description() - Method in class com.mycompany.model.CircuitElement
Return a short human-readable description of this element suitable for display, for example "R(100)" or "series(R(100), C(1e-6))".
description() - Method in class com.mycompany.model.Component
Returns a short description of the component including its type and value.
description() - Method in class com.mycompany.model.ConnectionNode
 
description() - Method in class com.mycompany.model.Inductor
 
description() - Method in class com.mycompany.model.Resistor
 
displayError(String) - Method in class com.mycompany.view.ConsoleView
Display an error message to the user.
displayResult(double, CompositeCircuit, Complex) - Method in class com.mycompany.view.ConsoleView
Display final result to the user.

E

equals(Object) - Method in record class com.mycompany.controller.CircuitController.ParseResult
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
equals(Object) - Method in record class com.mycompany.model.Complex
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
equals(Object) - Method in record class com.mycompany.model.ComponentSpec
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
ExpressionParser - Class in com.mycompany.model
Simple parser for nested circuit expressions like: series(R:100, parallel(C:1e-6, L:0.01), R:50) The parser returns a CircuitElement tree (ConnectionNode and Component leaves).

F

frequencyHz() - Method in record class com.mycompany.controller.CircuitController.ParseResult
Returns the value of the frequencyHz record component.

Return a snapshot list of child elements.

getImpedance(double) - Method in class com.mycompany.model.CircuitElement
Compute impedance of this element at the given frequency.
getImpedance(double) - Method in class com.mycompany.model.ConnectionNode
Compute equivalent impedance by aggregating child impedances.
getImpedance(double) - Method in class com.mycompany.model.Inductor

getRoot() - Method in class com.mycompany.model.CompositeCircuit

V

value - Variable in class com.mycompany.model.Component
Numeric parameter of the component: - resistor: resistance in Ohms - capacitor: capacitance in Farads - inductor: inductance in Henrys Protected so subclasses can access it.
value() - Method in record class com.mycompany.model.ComponentSpec
Returns the value of the value record component.
